title: Werckleocereus tonduzii
taxonomy: Werckleocereus tonduzii is a species of cactus in the genus Werckleocereus, which is part of the family Cactaceae. It is native to Central America, specifically Costa Rica and Panama. The classification of Werckleocereus tonduzii places it within the subfamily Cactoideae and tribe Pachycereeae. Werckleocereus tonduzii is closely related to other species in the same genus, such as Werckleocereus schottii. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification and relationships of this species.

The plant is known for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable resource for managing conditions such as arthritis and diabetes.
